creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
the manpages are installed into /usr/local/share/man/... instead of /usr/local/man/... and remain unzipped.
Creation of package via "pkg_create ..." fails.

Fix: change of two lines in the configure script concerning manpage location. Make some additions to files/patch-configure.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: after installing the port run "pkg_info -xg clamav" or try creating a package
